title: ServiceNow Investor Relations

note: Primary annual-report source for business model, product strategy, financial performance, risks, and operating context.

note: Earnings release source for 2025 subscription revenue, margin commentary, large-deal momentum, and management positioning.

title: Workflow Automation - ServiceNow
note: Product source for Now Platform workflow automation, low-code builders, AI-powered workflows, and cross-enterprise product scope.

title: IT Service Management - ServiceNow
note: Product source for ServiceNow ITSM capabilities including incident, change, problem, request, AI, governance, and platform consolidation claims.

title: ServiceNow Market Cap
note: Point-in-time market-data source for market capitalization and P/E ratio around the refresh date.

title: GLPI Project
note: Open-source ITSM and asset-management alternative relevant to ServiceNow ITSM replacement analysis.

note: Source for Zammad’s open-source positioning and helpdesk replacement relevance.

title: zammad/zammad
note: Public repository source for Zammad as an open-source web-based helpdesk and customer-support system.

title: backstage/backstage
note: Public repository source for Backstage as an open framework for internal developer portals and service catalogs.

title: What is OpenTelemetry?
note: Technical source for vendor-neutral open telemetry collection and export, relevant to reducing workflow and observability lock-in.

title: CNCF Announces OpenTelemetry Graduation
note: Source for OpenTelemetry’s CNCF graduation and production-readiness signal as a vendor-neutral observability standard.
